current_commit_message: api doc now includes class methods
jar_mod modplayer added (but sound quality is a bit low of this...)
got rid of modplayer, not pursuing this further

fixed a crash in vorbis_read_file due to missing malloc()/free() can now detect and open floating point WAV files reading a file now defaults to not converting it to 16 bits the play example makes use of this now and tries to play sounds without converting anything added passthrough option to playbackdevice
added backend selection to the various Devices. Fixes #4
can now set appname and threadprio on the device config
added dither mode to more functions removed passthrough on playback device, as it wasn't working several generic valueerrors are now MiniaudioError so we can differentiate
fix compiler options for non-x86 cpus (such as raspberrypi)
updated miniaudio C library to fix segfault in widechar functions
added seek_frame to various streaming funcions
fix build warnings on windows with microsoft's compiler that doesn't accept gcc style options
update miniaudio C library to 0.10.43-dev to get some small uninitialized variable and device enumeration fixes for ALSA backend
exceptions raised in read-callback will be caught and raised from the context of the stream generator instead. This allows user code to properly catch them.
also re-raise KeyboardInterrupt if it occurred in the stream callback thread.
Revert "also re-raise KeyboardInterrupt if it occurred in the stream callback thread."
avoid crash when not using StreamableSource
exclude high level api from build
added default frames_to_read to stream_raw_pcm_memory() so the generator can be used without send() as well
link with libatomic to fix build errors on some platforms
attempt to fix libatomic requirement detection
Added a way to process frame with a callback stream (#58)
allow reading WAV files with different encoding formats (like adpcm)
update to miniaudio 0.11.14 ,  added ssl_context to IceCastClient
Added HTML unescaping to icecast meta (#68)
fix compiler error on Python 3.12 and/or latest gcc
attempt to fix MacOS build issue
Revert "test for device name not being NULL": this doesn't work in the CI pipeline.
Remove problematic type check for Cython. Fixes #71
fix make test to use virtualenv to be able to find the C extension
support for non-ascii paths on windows
update github action tasks in attempt to build py 3.14 wheels
fix capture generator data format to represent the configured sample format. Fixes #61
added some more info in the docstrings to fix #62
fix uninitialized ma_context in device cleanup. fixes #86
Add bindings for `ma_device_{get|set}_master_volume` and add methods to `AbstractDevice` (#87)
